hero.tagline: I build scalable backends, ship real products, and care about code that actually works.
hero.name: Hi, I'm Berhudan

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm a software engineer born in 2001, graduated from Sakarya University with a degree in Computer Engineering. With 3+ years of experience shipping production systems, I've built everything from RESTful APIs and automation tools to cross-platform mobile apps and data pipelines — always focused on clean architecture and real-world impact. A perfectionist at heart, I'm currently open to new opportunities.
about.cta_subtitle: I'm currently available for freelance projects.

languages.desc: Natural and fluent communication, complete proficiency in all professional and social contexts.
Solid technical communication, writing documentation, and collaborating with international teams. Strengthened through language courses in the USA and a university degree taught in English.
Strong daily conversation skills and fluent communication in social/cultural contexts.
Basic greetings, simple daily conversations, and understanding of fundamental terms.

bullets: I led the digital transformation and built the company's internal systems from scratch
I developed an automated invoicing system that pulls and processes supplier product data
I built a personnel tracking application that's actively used in daily production
I built backend services and RESTful APIs for international clients
I implemented authentication flows and database integrations
I deployed and maintained production applications end-to-end
I supported purchasing and inventory operations at Hyatt Regency Bellevue
I worked in a fast-paced, English-speaking international environment
I built backend-focused web applications and internal tools
I wrote automation scripts that reduced manual workload by ~30%
I collaborated directly with clients to design and deliver tailored solutions

internships.desc: During the Agrobot R&D project I built the entire frontend system for automatically displaying and monitoring agricultural drone data fetched from backend services.
I assisted in data analysis and preprocessing using Python, and supported exploratory data analysis tasks for ongoing research projects.
I contributed to automation and control software projects and gained hands-on experience in hardware-software interaction and industrial automation systems.

certs.title: 100 Days of Code: Python Pro Bootcamp

skills.heading: Skills
skills.hint: hover the card corners to discover

services.name: Backend Engineering
services.description: I design and build the server-side logic that powers real applications — RESTful APIs, WebSocket-based real-time systems, authentication flows with JWT and session management, role-based access control, and background job queues. I've shipped backends handling live field operations, multi-tenant data isolation, Stripe payment integrations, and automated email/notification pipelines. Node.js + Express is my primary stack, FastAPI or Flask when Python is the better fit.

services.name: Frontend & Web
services.description: I turn designs and ideas into interfaces that are fast, accessible, and feel considered. React and Next.js for structure and SSR, Tailwind for layout, Framer Motion and GSAP for animations that make a UI feel alive. I've built everything from marketing sites with perfect Lighthouse scores to complex dashboards with real-time data feeds, multi-language routing, and dark/light theming. I care about performance — but more about whether the thing actually feels good to use.

services.name: Mobile Apps
services.description: I build iOS and Android apps with Flutter and React Native that are used daily in the field — not demos. My most complex Flutter deployment runs real-time personnel tracking with live map updates, an iOS home screen widget, push notifications via FCM, in-app purchases, biometric auth, and full 17-language support, backed by Supabase and PostgreSQL. On the React Native side I've shipped e-commerce and logistics apps with Expo and bare workflow, integrating Firebase, REST APIs, and native device modules.

services.name: Data & Automation
services.description: I write scripts that do the work so people don't have to. Data cleaning and transformation pipelines with Pandas and NumPy, scheduled scrapers and crawlers, automated report generators that export to Excel and PDF, and LangChain-powered AI workflows that process documents, answer questions from knowledge bases, and classify incoming data. I've also built FastAPI services that expose these pipelines as internal APIs and reduced manual operational workload by ~30% in live production environments.

services.name: Databases & DevOps
services.description: I design schemas that scale and don't break when data gets messy or traffic spikes. PostgreSQL with row-level security and complex joins, MongoDB for document-heavy workloads, MySQL for legacy integrations, Supabase for real-time subscriptions and instant auth setup, Redis for caching and pub/sub. On the infrastructure side: Docker and Docker Compose for environment parity, GitHub Actions for CI/CD pipelines, VPS deployment with Nginx reverse proxies, SSL configuration, and enough production incident experience to know what not to do.

cards.c1: Primary language for full-stack development. Powers React, Next.js, Node.js, and Express codebases with type-safe, scalable architecture.
cards.c2: Backend systems with Node.js, Express.js, RESTful APIs, and Firebase Functions. Builds performant server-side services deployed in production.
cards.c3: Component-driven UI with React.js and Next.js. Tailwind CSS, HTML5, and CSS3 for responsive, high-performance web applications.
cards.c4: Scripting, data pipelines, and automation. Pandas and NumPy for analysis; FastAPI for backend; LangChain for AI workflows.
cards.c5: End-to-end product engineering — Python, TypeScript, React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Docker, and Flutter. Architecture to live deployment.
cards.c6: Database design across MongoDB, PostgreSQL, MySQL, and Supabase. Row-level security, real-time subscriptions, and production-grade migrations.
cards.c7: Production Flutter app at MKG. Real-time personnel tracking with Supabase backend, iOS widget, 17 languages — used daily in the field.
cards.c8: Container orchestration with Docker, CI/CD pipelines, Git workflows, and cloud deployments. From local dev to live production infrastructure.
cards.c9: Cross-platform mobile with React Native, MobX state management, IAP monetization, Google Ads, and native Node.js bridge integrations.

10.desc: Buyuk olcekte urun verisi cikaran otomatik AliExpress kazima pipeline. MKG otomatik faturalandirmasini guncel katalogla destekliyor.

11.desc: Next.js App Router ve Supabase ile gercek zamanli envanter takip uygulamasi. Canli stok izleme, urun yonetimi ve operasyonel ekipler icin anlik guncelleme.
hi: Depo ekipleri icin rol tabanli erisim

12.desc: Aura kreatif studyo icin modern animasyon oncelikli ajans sitesi. Akici CSS animasyonlari, tamamen duyarli tasarim ve rafine marka kimligi. Aktif olarak canli ve bakim yapiliyor.
hi: Mobilden ultra genis ekrana tam duyarli

13.desc: Hasta randevu akisi, uzmanlik filtreli doktor arama, gercek zamanli musaitlik takibi ve klinik personel admin arayuzu iceren doktor randevu web uygulamasi.
hi: MongoDB randevu ve hasta veri modeli
JWT kimlik dogrulamali Express.js REST API

14.desc: GPU hizlandirmali WebGL canvas animasyonlariyla gorsek acidan iddiali 3D web deneyimi — yuksek voltajli elektrik ark efektleri, parcacik sistemleri ve 60fps dinamik aydinlatma.

01.desc: Turk kargo firmalarini tek API altinda toplayan lojistik MVP. Tek istekte tum firmalardan sirali fiyat/sure doner. Musteri secer, sistem otomatik rezervasyon yapar.
hi: Paralel firma sorgulari, normalize yanit semasi
Tum firmalar arasi birlesik GPS takibi
Firma yonetimi ve gecmis admin paneli

02.desc: OpenRouter yapay zeka destekli gelismis guvenlik acigi tarayicisi. 150+ istek/sn, %3.2 yanlis pozitif. WAF atlama ve adaptif gizlilikle 10+ zafiyet sinifinda kapsamli tespit.
hi: GPT-4 / Claude / Llama 3 yapay zeka triyaji
SQLi, XSS, CSRF, SSRF, LFI, XXE tespiti
CT log sayimiyla alt alan adi kesfi

03.desc: Tibbi urun ve ticaret sirketleri icin tam CRM — musteri yonetimi, satis hatti, envanter, faturalandirma, finansal analitik ve is akisi otomasyonu. Gercek zamanli WebSocket bildirimler.
hi: Gercek zamanli KPI panosu ve satis hunisi

04.desc: Gercek zamanli Firebase senkronizasyonu, Three.js 3D molekuler gorsellestirimler ve tam RTL destekli cok dilli sertifika yonetimi iceren kimyasal urun platformu.
hi: CAS no, SKU, formul, marka aramalari

05.desc: Cihazda JIMP goruntu isleme icin yerel Node.js koprusu olan iOS/Android depolama temizleyici. Yinelenen fotograflari tespit eder, IAP premium paketler, 17+ dil, Google Reklam, iOS widget.
hi: GPU goruntu analizi icin yerel Node.js koprusu
Paylasilan App Group depolu iOS widget
Google Mobile Ads odul ve gecis

06.desc: Cok borsali kripto icin dusuk gecikmeli otomatik HFT sistemi. Sistematik risk yonetimi, minimum kayma hedeflemesi ve gercek zamanli K/Z takibi ile yapilandirilabilir stop-loss.
hi: Milisaniye alti WebSocket emir defteri alimi
Gercek zamanli K/Z panosu ve dusus izleme

07.desc: Freqtrade uzerinde uretim kaliteli otomatik alim satim botu. Ozel TA-Lib strateji mantigi, OHLCV geriye donuk test, canli alim satim ve performans panosu — Docker konteynerli.
hi: Gecmis OHLCV verilerinde tam geriye donuk test

08.desc: TUBiTAK BiLGEM stajinda Agrobot projesi icin gelistirilen Ar-Ge drone veri izleme frontend. Arastirmacilar icin drone kaynakli saha verilerini otomatik olarak ceker ve gorsellestiriyor.
hi: Saha kullanimi icin React duyarli pano

09.desc: MKG Elektromekanik icin dijital donusum paketi. Tedarikci verilerinden otomatik faturalandirma ve Flutter personel takip uygulamasi — her ikisi uretimde aktif kullanim.
hi: Manuel is yukunu onemli olcude azaltti

contact.reach: Reach out via {{platform}}. Whether you want to collaborate, have a project in mind, or just want to say hi — I'm always open.

hobbies.heading: Hobbies
hobbies.caption: Flawless experiences aren't just built with pixels. The rhythms that fill my life when I disconnect from the screen, the angles captured through the viewfinder, and the passions that recharge my energy.
hobbies.editorial_desc: [ The real formula behind flawless interfaces: Living life in multi-dimension. Framing the light, synthesizing the rhythm, exploring your own limits. ]

quotes.c: First, solve the problem. Then, write the code.
Make it work, make it right, make it fast.
Code is like humor. When you have to explain it, it is bad.
If debugging is removing bugs, programming must be putting them in.
Simplicity is the soul of efficiency.
It always seems impossible until it is done.
The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
Push yourself, because no one else is going to do it for you.
Great things never come from comfort zones.
Do not stop when you are tired. Stop when you are done.
Work hard in silence. Let success make the noise.
Be so good they cannot ignore you.
The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
Opportunities do not happen. You create them.
